---
title: "8-Bit Sheep AI Assistant — Project Plan v0.1"
author: "Mark"
date: "2026-05-28"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    geometry:
      - top=25mm
      - left=25mm
      - right=25mm
      - bottom=25mm
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{booktabs}
        \usepackage{longtable}
metadata:
  status: "Draft for review"
  budget: "20,000 EUR (200 hrs @ 100 EUR/hr)"
  poc-target: "v0.1 pilot-ready"
---

## What We Are Building

An AI assistant platform that automates and assists with 8bs routine admin tasks — initially Sales (Severa) and Finance (Netvisor, Säästöpankki). The assistant is accessible via Discord, email, and a web UI. New use cases (skills) can be added without rebuilding the platform.

### What this is NOT

- A replacement for Severa or Netvisor — the assistant reads data from them and drafts actions for a human to confirm
- A full automation system on day one — v0.1 is read-only access with human-in-the-loop approval for any writes
- A long development project — the platform foundation already exists (open-source template), so we are deploying and configuring, not building from scratch

---

## Foundation: What Already Exists

The `sunholo-data/ai-protocol-platform` (MIT-licensed, public) is a production-ready platform template that provides:

- Google ADK agent framework (Google's AI agent SDK)
- Cloud Run deployment (scale-to-zero, serverless)
- Terraform for dev/test/prod environments
- Skills system — add new AI capabilities as isolated modules
- MCP protocol — standard interface for connecting tools (Severa, Drive, etc.)
- Discord, email channel connectors (framework-level)
- Web UI for chat, debugging and analytics
- Firebase authentication
- CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions + Cloud Build)

**This means Phase 0 and Phase 1 below are configuration and deployment work, not greenfield development.**

---

## Phases

### Phase 0 — GCP Infrastructure Setup
**Owner: Mark | Estimate: 8 hrs**

| Task | Notes |
|------|-------|
| Fork template to `8-bit-sheep` GitHub org | Creates private internal repo |
| GCP projects: dev / test / prod | Parallel environments, same as template pattern |
| Terraform bootstrap | Service accounts, IAM, Cloud Run services |
| GitHub Actions CI/CD | Automated deploy on push to dev/test/prod branches |
| GitHub repo + Issues + Project board | Kanban board for task tracking (as requested) |
| Local dev environment docs | So others can run it locally without GCP credentials |

**DoD:** `make dev` starts the platform locally; push to `dev` branch auto-deploys to GCP dev environment.

---

### Phase 1 — Core Platform Deployment
**Owner: Mark | Estimate: 8 hrs**

| Task | Notes |
|------|-------|
| Deploy backend + frontend to Cloud Run (dev) | Web UI accessible at 8bs dev URL |
| Firebase auth with 8bs Google Workspace | Sheep log in with their @8bitsh... Google accounts |
| Smoke tests + health checks | Automated verification that deploy succeeded |
| Basic "hello" skill end-to-end | Proves the chain works before adding real integrations |
| Analytics dashboard wired up | OpenTelemetry → Cloud Logging (GCP-internal, no 3rd-party) |

**DoD:** Any Sheep can open the web UI, log in with Google, and chat with the assistant. Usage visible in GCP console.

---

### Phase 2 — MCP Tool Connectors (Integrations)
**Owner: Mark (lead) + delegatable | Estimate: 16 hrs total**

Each connector is an isolated Python module exposing the external API as MCP tools. Read-only by default; write operations require explicit approval in Phase 3+.

#### 2a — Severa CRM/Hours (Mark, ~5 hrs)
- Authenticate with Severa REST API (OAuth token per-user)
- Tools: `list_projects`, `get_hours`, `get_invoices`, `list_contacts`
- Read-only. No write access in v0.1.

#### 2b — Netvisor Finance (Mark, ~5 hrs)
- Authenticate with Netvisor API
- Tools: `get_invoices`, `get_salary_data`, `get_cost_entries`
- Read-only. No write access in v0.1.

#### 2c — Säästöpankki Bank (Mark, ~4 hrs)
- Bank API authentication + account access
- Tools: `get_transactions`, `get_balance`
- Read-only. No write access in v0.1.

#### 2d — Google Drive (delegatable, ~2 hrs)
- Already partially supported by template
- Tools: `list_files`, `read_doc`, `search_drive`

**DoD:** Each connector has unit tests and can be called from the assistant CLI.

---

### Phase 3 — Initial Skills (Use Cases)
**Owner: Mark (design) + delegatable (implementation) | Estimate: 12 hrs**

Skills are the user-facing AI capabilities. Each skill combines the MCP connectors above with a focused prompt and workflow.

#### Skill 1 — Weekly Hours Summary (~3 hrs)
- "What hours have I logged this week in Severa?"
- Pushes summary to Discord DM or email on schedule

#### Skill 2 — Open Invoices & Cash Flow (~3 hrs)
- "Show me overdue invoices" / "What's our current cash position?"
- Pulls from Severa (invoices) + Säästöpankki (balance)

#### Skill 3 — Monthly Finance Snapshot (~3 hrs)
- Combines Netvisor + Säästöpankki data
- Drafted summary for Finance review, not final output

#### Skill 4 — Project Status Briefing (~3 hrs)
- Pulls active projects + hours vs budget from Severa
- "Which projects are over/under budget?"

**DoD:** Each skill is accessible via the web UI, Discord, and email. Output is readable and correct based on real data from the APIs.

---

### Phase 4 — Channels
**Owner: Mark (Discord) + delegatable (email) | Estimate: 6 hrs**

| Channel | Estimate | Notes |
|---------|----------|-------|
| Discord bot | 3 hrs | Sheep can query the assistant in the 8bs Discord server |
| Email | 2 hrs | Send summary reports to a configured address on schedule |
| Web UI polish | 1 hr | Navigation, branding, basic analytics view |

**DoD:** Sheep can interact with the assistant via Discord `@assistant what are my hours this week?` and receive a reply.

---

### Stretch Goal — RAG Backend (Gemini Enterprise)
**Owner: TBD | Estimate: 10 hrs**

If Gemini Enterprise is available on the GCP projects:
- Document ingestion from Google Drive (contracts, invoices, meeting notes)
- "Find the clause about invoicing in the XYZ client contract" style queries
- Builds the foundation for client-facing use cases later

This is explicitly out of scope for v0.1 unless Phase 0–4 finishes under budget.

---

## Task Allocation

| Phase | Hours | Mark | Delegatable |
|-------|-------|------|-------------|
| 0 — Infrastructure | 8 | 8 | 0 |
| 1 — Core Platform | 8 | 8 | 0 |
| 2 — Connectors | 19 | 17 | 2 (Drive) |
| 3 — Skills | 12 | 4 | 8 |
| 4 — Channels | 6 | 3 | 3 |
| **PoC v0.1 total** | **53** | **40** | **13** |
| RAG stretch | 10 | 2 | 8 |
| **Project total (v0.1 + stretch)** | **63** | **42** | **21** |

**Remaining budget after v0.1:** ~147 hrs for v0.2 enhancements, new skills, and client-facing work.

---

## What Can Be Delegated

The following tasks require no deep platform knowledge and are good learning tasks for contributors:

- **Google Drive connector** (Phase 2d) — well-documented API, clear interface
- **Skills implementation** (Phase 3) — each skill is a focused Python module with a clear spec; Mark provides the template
- **Email channel** (Phase 4) — template has the framework, configuration only
- **GitHub issues / project board setup** — kanban for the whole project
- **Testing** — writing test cases for connectors and skills, running them
- **Documentation** — README, user guide for each skill

**Prerequisites for contributors:**
- Python basics
- Google account with access to 8bs GCP dev project
- `make dev` running locally (documented in repo)

---

## Out of Scope for v0.1

| Item | Reason |
|------|--------|
| Severa write access (create hours, invoices) | Risk; requires separate approval decision |
| Netvisor write access | Same as above |
| Browser automation / Stagehand for Severa | Flaky and slow; Severa REST API now available |
| Client-facing deployment | After v0.1 is proven internally first |
| A2A marketplace (Gemini Enterprise) | Infrastructure for later — compatible by design, not deployed yet |
| Mobile app | Web UI covers this via browser |

---

## Estimate Basis

These estimates are calibrated against two prior deployments of the same platform template:

### Aitana Platform (internal, April–May 2026)
The Aitana v6 platform is the source of the public template. Its sprint history shows:

- **Cloud infrastructure sprint:** estimated 2.5 days, shipped on schedule
- **Auth + permissions sprint:** estimated 3.5 days, shipped on schedule
- **No blown estimates** across Phase 0–1 equivalent work

The post-May-2026 template (what 8bs will fork) has auth hardening, branding config, and fork ergonomics already built in — this removes most of the friction encountered in the early Aitana sprints.

### AIPLA — University of Copenhagen (May 2026)
A production fork of the same template for an AI-in-Physics learning project. Platform was deployed and operational within a comparable 40-hour window. The AIPLA fork is referenced at [sunholo.com/aipla](https://www.sunholo.com/aipla).

### What the estimates cover

| Phase | Risk | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| 0–1 Infrastructure + deploy | Low | Mostly configuration; template does the heavy lifting |
| 2a Severa connector | Low–Medium | REST API now approved; auth pattern is standard OAuth |
| 2b Netvisor connector | Medium | Depends on API documentation quality |
| 2c Säästöpankki connector | Medium–High | Bank API auth complexity unknown until tested |
| 3–4 Skills + channels | Low | Template provides the framework; custom logic only |

**The main estimate risk is API access complexity for Netvisor and Säästöpankki.** If either requires per-user OAuth flows with poor documentation, add 2–4 hrs each. Severa is low-risk as the API is now confirmed and well-documented.

---

## Budget View

| Item | EUR |
|------|-----|
| Mark — PoC v0.1 (40 hrs) | 4,000 |
| Contributor work (13 hrs) | 1,300 |
| Severa API upgrade (monthly) | 200/mth |
| GCP Cloud Run + Firebase (estimated) | ~50–100/mth |
| **v0.1 one-off build cost** | **~5,000** |
| **Remaining budget for v0.2+** | **~15,000** |

---

## Definition of Done — v0.1 Pilot

v0.1 is complete when:

- [ ] Any Sheep can log in with their 8bs Google account
- [ ] Assistant can answer "what are my hours this week?" using live Severa data
- [ ] Assistant can answer "show me open invoices" using live Severa data
- [ ] Assistant can answer "what's our bank balance?" using Säästöpankki data
- [ ] Discord bot responds to queries in the 8bs server
- [ ] Finance snapshot skill sends a weekly email summary
- [ ] All data access is read-only; no writes to any system
- [ ] Usage and errors are visible in the GCP console (no 3rd-party analytics)
- [ ] At least one Sheep other than Mark can add a new simple skill without Mark's help

---

## Proposed Next Steps

1. **Mark:** Fork template to 8bs GitHub org, create GitHub Project board with Issues mirroring this plan
2. **groner:** Confirm GCP project names/IDs for 8bs (or confirm we create new ones)
3. **Leevi / designated Sheep:** Set up Severa API token in Severa Settings → Integrations → REST API
4. **temeke (or anyone):** Claim a delegatable task from Phase 3 or 4 once Phase 0–2 land
5. **Everyone:** Agree on Discord server/channel for the bot to live in

---

## Questions Still Open

1. **GCP projects** — do we create new `8bs-dev`, `8bs-test`, `8bs-prod` projects, or use existing ones?
2. **GitHub org** — `8-bit-sheep` or different org name?
3. **Netvisor API** — same approval as Severa, or still in discussion?
4. **Säästöpankki** — what API access exists? (contact at bank, or existing Open Banking integration?)
5. **Discord** — which server / which channel for the bot?
6. **Temeke's start date** — post-midsummer July slot works; align with Phase 3 start (after infra and connectors are done)
